meaning: adj.有俸给的,领薪金的n.领薪金者,受俸给者
examples: A single stipendiary magistrate or three lay magistrates sit in the magistrates 'court.
In order to try a case there must be at least two lay (non-lawyer) magistrates, or a stipendiary magistrate.
Now here is a quick answer for this difference: It is because the evaluation system and policy of stipendiary (salary).
Appearing relaxed before stipendiary magistrate Kevin Gray, sitting in Southend, Essex, 11 of the men were remanded until 13 March.
